parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: `[Agent Monitor] Low confidence execution detected`, blocks: [{ type: 'header', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: 'Low Confidence Alert' }}, { type: 'section', fields: [{ type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Agent:* ${$json.agent || 'unknown'}` }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Confidence:* ${$json.composite_confidence}` }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Threshold:* ${$json.threshold}` }, { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Action:* ${$json.action || 'unknown'}` }]}, { type: 'section', text: { type: 'mrkdwn', text: `*Command:* _${($json.original_command || $json.command || 'N/A').substring(0, 200)}_` }}, { type: 'actions', elements: [{ type: 'button', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: 'Approve' }, style: 'primary', value: $json.execution_id || '' }, { type: 'button', text: { type: 'plain_text', text: 'Reject' }, style: 'danger', value: $json.execution_id || '' }]}] }) }}

parameters.content:
## 9000 - Monitor & Audit

Receives execution data from the orchestrator or agents after each run.

**Composite Confidence Formula:**
- Agent confidence: 70% weight
- Classification confidence: 20% weight
- Time penalty: 10% weight (penalizes slow executions)

**Threshold:** 0.7 (configurable)
- Below threshold → Slack alert with approve/reject buttons
- All executions → logged to Google Sheets audit trail

**Audit columns:** timestamp, execution_id, agent, action, command, composite_confidence, agent_confidence, classification_confidence, below_threshold, requires_approval, approval_reason, routed_to_review, execution_time_ms, result_summary, status

## Setup

1. Replace Slack webhook URL with your workspace's incoming webhook
2. Replace SPREADSHEET_ID with your audit log Google Sheet ID
3. Create sheet tab named 'AuditLog' with headers matching audit columns
4. Add Google Sheets and Slack credentials
5. Wire this workflow to receive data from the orchestrator's post-execution hook
